log: === INITIATIVE ===

Goblin — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Goblin — Unarmored Caster for 9. HP: 38/67

→ 7 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!

→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 8 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: vm_disadvantage
